mode.title: Scrape Mode
enumTitles: Single Application - Scrape one planning application URL
Search Results - Extract applications from a search results page

url.title: Application URL
url.description: URL of a single planning application (for 'single' mode)

searchUrl.title: Search Results URL
searchUrl.description: URL of planning search results page (for 'search' mode)

urls.title: Application URLs
urls.description: List of planning application URLs (for 'batch' mode)

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum applications to extract from search results

saveScreenshots.title: Save Screenshots
saveScreenshots.description: Save raw screenshots to key-value store (useful for debugging)

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. Note: UK council sites often block cloud IPs - consider using your own residential proxy instead.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: UK council sites block most datacenter and cloud IPs. For best results, use your own residential proxy (customProxyUrl below).

customProxyUrl.title: Custom Proxy URL (Recommended)
customProxyUrl.description: Your own proxy URL (e.g., http://user:pass@proxy.example.com:8080). UK councils block cloud IPs - a residential proxy from your home network or a dedicated proxy service works best.
customProxyUrl.sectionDescription: UK government planning portals actively block cloud datacenter IPs. For reliable scraping, provide your own residential proxy. Options: 1) Run a proxy on your home network, 2) Use a premium residential proxy service, 3) Set up a VPS with residential IP.
